message:
🐛 Add document-level paste/copy handlers for tile mode (#134)

xterm.js internal paste handling breaks when terminals are moved
between DOM containers (single ↔ tile mode via appendChild). Added
document-level event listeners that reliably route clipboard events
to the correct terminal:

- paste: reads clipboardData and sends to focused tile's WebSocket
- copy: checks all terminals for selection and copies to clipboard

These handlers work regardless of xterm's internal textarea state,
fixing clipboard in tile mode.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
